Created attachment 240306
Patch for juliamono

Adding a port for juliamono, a monospaced font designed for scientific and technical computing.

The website is here: https://juliamono.netlify.app/

Changelog is here: https://github.com/cormullion/juliamono/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
